prompt: Create a premium 2.5D realistic printed art board displayed as a physical gallery object: a framed vertical anime portrait of NOZOMU, shown leaning slightly backward on a white tabletop against a soft gray studio background. The artwork is not a figurine; it is a high-end textured UV clear-ink print where only selected parts rise glossy and tactile from the flat board. The character is a delicate young anime girl in side profile facing right, with very long flowing pearl white silver hair, violet-blue eyes, pale skin, a calm wistful expression, and a light blue-white sleeveless dress with ruffled trim. Emphasize raised translucent gloss on exactly these feature groups: 1 eye highlights and irises, 2 individual hair strands and outlines, 3 floral hair ornaments, 4 ribbon-like hair accessories and dangling jewelry, 5 butterfly wings, 6 water droplets and bubbles, 7 dress ruffles and blue line art accents. Include exactly one large blue butterfly hovering near her lips and exactly one tiny flower held near her raised right hand. Her hair decoration contains a clustered arrangement of pastel flowers, including pink roses, blue hydrangea-like blossoms, small lavender flowers, green leaves, pearl beads, and dangling teardrop ornaments, all rendered with embossed clear resin shine. The portrait background is a smooth blue gradient with small bubble motifs; add vertical text inside the artwork reading NOZOMU along the right side, plus small decorative letters near the upper right that resemble bubbles. Use a white ornate frame with beveled molding, silver inner trim, and a subtle beaded edge; the framed board casts realistic shadows and reflections. Place a small white museum-style label card leaning at the lower right in front of the frame. The label should read: NOZOMU, then “Whisper of Blue Petals”, then “2.5D REAL PRINTING”, “LIMITED TEXTURE ART BOARD”, “UV CLEAR INK LAYER”, and “SPECIAL EXHIBITION SAMPLE”. Style: ultra-clean product photography, soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, crisp macro detail, pearlescent pastel palette, glossy raised resin texture, realistic print-material edges, luxurious collectible art-board presentation. Avoid making it look like a 3D figurine, sculpture, or plain flat poster; the character image must remain printed on the board while the glossy details appear physically raised.
